name: RPG-mix
description:
Welcome to RPG-mix! Choose a mode and start your story! Fantasy Middle Ages, modern world or the world of the future! Become whoever you want and enjoy! Here you have great freedom and the opportunity to immerse yourself in your own world, where you write your own story!

╔═══════════════════════╗

For those who complain that the bot speaks on your behalf, I wrote in the bot that it should NOT speak on your behalf, so this is an error in your API. To fix this, it will be enough to edit the bot's message or delete the last few messages.

╚═══════════════════════╝
creator: Namulantas
